per_clue.clue_text: Founder of religious sect recalled you once entertaining theologian
per_clue.blog: YE is what we once used for “you”. Reverse that and insert DD for our Doctor of Divinity theologian. Sect sounds quite pejorative but in the dictionaries is simply defined as a subdivision of one of the main religious divisions of mankind. I don’t know how many this will be a NHO for but Mary Baker EDDY was well known to me as my grandmother subscribed to the Church of Christ, Scientist of which Mary Baker Eddy was the founder. I will let readers read and make up their own minds but I don’t think it would be unfair to say that “Scientist” is something of a misnomer. Whatever you think of their beliefs, the success and spread of the “subdivision” after the end of the 19th century was quite notable.
